text: خَرَجَ عَنْ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) حِينَ قُتِلَ الزُّبَيْرِيُّ هَذَا جَزَاءُ مَنِ افْتَرَى عَلَى اللَّهِ فِي أَوْلِيَائِهِ زَعَمَ أَنَّهُ يَقْتُلُنِي وَ لَيْسَ لِي عَقِبٌ فَكَيْفَ رَأَى قُدْرَةَ اللَّهِ وَ وُلِدَ لَهُ وَلَدٌ سَمَّاهُ م‏ح‏م‏د سَنَةَ سِتٍّ وَ خَمْسِينَ وَ مِائَتَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad who said,

‘There came out (a letter) from Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) when Al-Zubeyri was killed: ‘This is the Recompense of the one who forges (a lie) upon Allah<sup>azwj</sup> regarding His<sup>azwj</sup> Guardians<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> claimed that he would be killing me<sup>asws</sup> and that there isn’t a posterity for me<sup>asws</sup>. So how does he see the Power of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>?’ And there he<sup>asws</sup> was Blessed with a son<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> named him<sup>asws</sup> As M H M D, in the year two hundred and fifty six (256 A.H.)’.
en.sarwar: He was born on fifteenth of the month of Sha‘ban in the year two hundred fifty five AH.
